title: Shibuya Transported
overview: Seven years after a mysterious woman named Milo saved him and his friends, Daisuke's still training and waiting for disaster to strike. Finally it does.

title: Hero Complex
overview: She doesn't know him, but Milo conscripts Daisuke to fight the revision attacking the school. Shibuya officials try to figure out the situation.

title: The Guardians
overview: It's the year 2388 and the world has fallen to a pandemic. Milo tells Daisuke and his friends what she knows about the past. Later, they find trouble.

title: First Plan of Return
overview: Muta declares that the revisions will send a list of people back to 2017 in return for the String Puppets. An unhappy Daisuke meets a revision.

title: The Future
overview: With Muta in jail and the police in charge, the S.D.S. continues to train. Daisuke thinks he's the leader, but Kuroiwa wants Gai to take on that role.

title: Human After All
overview: Marimari confronts Milo in the ruins of the birthday party, demanding to know the truth about the revisions. Daisuke's uncle escapes custody.

title: Midnight Rhapsody
overview: With Daisuke in a holding cell, Kuroiwa and the others find out more about the revisions and what AHRV knows. Milo swears that they can return home.

title: Operation Nephilim
overview: Daisuke and the squad set out on a mission to rescue the hostages and destroy the artificial quantum brain -- but the revisions are ready for them.

title: Doomed to Vanish
overview: In the wake of Keisaku's actions, the surviving revisions retool their plan. While the S.D.S. is in disarray, Muta's supporters make their move.

title: Our City
overview: Milo informs everyone that it's almost time for her to go to 2010, but not before she participates in the battle against Mukyu at Shibuya station.

title: The Last Hope
overview: The team listens to a message from Milo revealing the truth about AHRV. The String Puppets are out of energy and Shibuya is running low on hope.

title: revert
overview: Shibuya's people are overjoyed when the reversion works, but there's a cost. Nicholas jumps back in time, and Daisuke confronts him and Milo in 2010.
